title: garuga floribunda var. floribunda
intro: Garuga floribunda var. floribunda, also known as the Garuga or Himalayan garuga, is a deciduous tree native to the Himalayan region and parts of Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Garuga floribunda var. floribunda are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic. Garuga floribunda var. floribunda is traditionally used to make herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
